prediction.chief_complaint: left big toe joint pain, swelling, redness — gout flare
plan: indomethacin 50 mg three times a day with food until flare resolves, usually 5 to 7 days
ice, elevate, and rest the joint
start allopurinol 100 mg once a day after flare settles, titrate to uric acid under 6
limit red meat, shellfish, beer; hydrate
